# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prebuild
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR: "ci/scripts"
  BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR: "build"
  ARTIFACTS_DIR: "artifacts"
  ALLOW_FAILURE: "false"
  CUSTOM_ENV_FILE: ".env.ci"

.shared_runner_template:
  tags:
    - shared
  retry:
    max: 2
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure

.load_custom_env:
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" ]; then
        echo "Loading custom environment variables from $CUSTOM_ENV_FILE"
        set -a
        source $CUSTOM_ENV_FILE
        set +a
      fi
    - |
      if [ -d "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR" ]; then
        chmod +x $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
      fi

prebuild:setup:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: prebuild
  script:
    - echo "Running prebuild setup..."
    - mkdir -p $BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR $ARTIFACTS_DIR
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/prebuild.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom prebuild script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/prebuild.sh
      else
        echo "No custom prebuild script found, skipping..."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR/
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/
    expire_in: 1 hour

prebuild:dependencies:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: prebuild
  script:
    - echo "Installing dependencies..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/install-dependencies.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom dependency installation script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/install-dependencies.sh
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Detected Node.js project, installing npm dependencies..."
        npm install
      elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
        echo "Detected Python project, installing pip dependencies..."
        pip install -r requirements.txt
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Detected Maven project, downloading dependencies..."
        mvn dependency:resolve
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
        echo "Detected Gradle project, downloading dependencies..."
        gradle dependencies
      else
        echo "No dependency installation method detected, skipping..."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - node_modules/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
      - vendor/
      - venv/
    expire_in: 1 hour
  allow_failure: $ALLOW_FAILURE

build:custom:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: build
  dependencies:
    - prebuild:setup
    - prebuild:dependencies
  script:
    - echo "Starting custom build process..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/build.sh
      else
        echo "ERROR: No custom build script found at $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/build.sh"
        echo "Please create a build script or use specific build job templates"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR/
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - bin/
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    expire_in: 1 week

build:docker:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: build
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/build-docker.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom Docker build script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/build-docker.sh
      elif [ -f "Dockerfile" ]; then
        echo "Building Docker image with default configuration..."
        docker build -t $CI_PROJECT_NAME:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA .
      else
        echo "No Docker build configuration found, skipping..."
        exit 0
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
      exists:
        - Dockerfile
        - $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/build-docker.sh
  allow_failure: true

test:unit:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: test
  dependencies:
    - build:custom
  script:
    - echo "Running unit tests..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/test-unit.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom unit test script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/test-unit.sh
      else
        echo "No custom unit test script found, skipping..."
        exit 0
      fi
  coverage: '/TOTAL.*\s+(\d+%)$/'
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results/junit.xml
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
    expire_in: 30 days
  allow_failure: $ALLOW_FAILURE

test:integration:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: test
  dependencies:
    - build:custom
  script:
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/test-integration.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom integration test script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/test-integration.sh
      else
        echo "No custom integration test script found, skipping..."
        exit 0
      fi
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results/integration-junit.xml
    paths:
      - test-results/
    expire_in: 30 days
  allow_failure: $ALLOW_FAILURE

test:custom:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: test
  dependencies:
    - build:custom
  script:
    - echo "Running custom tests..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/test-custom.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/test-custom.sh
      else
        echo "No additional custom test script found, skipping..."
        exit 0
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - reports/
    expire_in: 30 days
  allow_failure: true

package:artifacts:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: package
  dependencies:
    - build:custom
  script:
    - echo "Packaging artifacts..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/package.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom packaging script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/package.sh
      else
        echo "Creating default package..."
        mkdir -p $ARTIFACTS_DIR
        tar -czf $ARTIFACTS_DIR/release-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA.tar.gz $BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR/ || true
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/
    expire_in: 90 days
  only:
    - main
    - master
    - tags
    - develop

deploy:staging:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - package:artifacts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-staging.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom staging deployment script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-staging.sh
      else
        echo "No custom staging deployment script found"
        echo "Please create $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-staging.sh for deployment"
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: cleanup:staging
  only:
    - develop
  when: manual

deploy:production:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - package:artifacts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-production.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom production deployment script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-production.sh
      else
        echo "No custom production deployment script found"
        echo "Please create $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-production.sh for deployment"
        exit 1
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  only:
    - main
    - master
    - tags
  when: manual

deploy:custom:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - package:artifacts
  script:
    - echo "Running custom deployment..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-custom.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deployment script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/deploy-custom.sh
      else
        echo "No custom deployment script found, skipping..."
        exit 0
      fi
  when: manual
  allow_failure: true

cleanup:staging:
  extends:
    - .shared_runner_template
    - .load_custom_env
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Cleaning up staging environment..."
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/cleanup-staging.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom staging cleanup script..."
        bash $CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR/cleanup-staging.sh
      else
        echo "No custom cleanup script found"
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  when: manual
  only:
    - develop
